stemHtml: As an aircraft accelerates through the transonic speed range, it exceeds its Critical Mach number. A normal shock wave forms on the upper surface of the wing, which induces flow separation. This causes...

options.a: up wash over the tail, causing a nose down pitching moment.
options.b: turbulent air to hit the tail, producing a severe airframe buffet.
options.c: turbulent air to hit the elevator causing only a light buffet.
options.d: downwash over the tail causing a nose up pitching moment.
